choice_list: lose your starting relic obtain a random boss relic

options.text: [ Lose your starting Relic Obtain a random boss Relic ]
options.label: Lose your starting Relic Obtain a random boss Relic

screen_state.body_text: As you walk into the room you hear a gurgling and the grinding of metals. Before you is a slime-like creature that ate too much scrap for its own good. From the center of the creature you see glints of strange light, perhaps something magical? It looks like you can get some treasure if you just reach inside its... opening. However, the acid and sharp objects may hurt.

options.text: [Reach Inside] Lose 3 HP. 25%: Find a Relic.
options.label: Reach Inside

screen_state.body_text: Success!  After rummaging through the metal and burning acid, you finally grab hold of a relic and yank it out.  You pull your way out of the ooze damaged but rewarded.

You walk into a room to find a large hole in the ground. As you approach the hole, an enormous serpent creature appears from within.   "Ho hooo! Hello hello! what have we got here? Hello adventurer, I ask a simple question.  The most fulfilling of lives is that in which you can buy anything!  Do you agree?"
"Yeeeeeeessssssssssessss!  Thisss will all be worthhh it.  ..ssSSs..... ss... sssss....!"
The serpent rears its head and blasts a stream of gold upwards!  It is amazing and terrifying simultaneously.  You gather all the gold, thank the snake, and get going.
You come across an inconspicuous pedestal with a shining gold idol sitting peacefully atop. It looks incredibly valuable.   You sure don't see any traps nearby.

options.text: [Take] Obtain Golden Idol. Trigger a trap.
options.label: Take

screen_state.body_text: As you grab the Idol and stow it away, a giant boulder smashes through the ceiling into the ground next to you.  You realize that the floor is slanted downwards as the boulder starts to roll towards you.
RUUUUUUUUUUN!  You barely leap into a side passageway as the boulder rushes by. Unfortunately it feels like you sprained something however.
